caption:
Day one. The swarm is online.

CJP Drip is a satirical merch shop for the Cockroach Janta Party movement. Born from a quote. Built by a generation tired of being ignored.

🛒 cjpdrip.store
📦 Ships across India
💳 UPI / Card / Netbanking

— Wear the verdict —

Not a stat. A whole generation.

Help wanted.

We're looking for designers, illustrators, satirists, art-school dropouts, and freelancers who want to draw for India's most viral political movement.

✅ We pay per design
✅ We credit you publicly
✅ No corporate notes, ever

Apply now → cjpdrip.store/artists
